justifications.clarity: Definitions are formally stated (e.g., def:scaled-dot-product-attn) and each section opens with a motivational paragraph; the transformer section is dense but all symbols are introduced before use.
justifications.rigor: Three propositions carry complete proofs (thm:vanish-explode, thm:sqrt-dk-scaling, thm:pe-relative); all LSTM and GRU equations are fully labelled with dimensions stated explicitly.
justifications.completeness: All 11 outline-curator-approved sections are present and substantive; the API section includes working Python code for three providers; the roadmap table covers all 14 planned chapters.
justifications.pedagogy: Eight explicit learning objectives added at chapter opening; difficulty progresses from history through classical representations to full transformer mathematics; worked examples (TF-IDF computation, PCA case study, API walkthrough) and a chapter summary subsection reinforce learning.
justifications.style: Academic register is consistent across all 11 sections; LaTeX environments (theorem, definition, remark, example) are used correctly; one cite-key mismatch (hochreiter1997lstm) was caught and fixed.
